docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF CONTINUATION OF HEARING BY COURT

THE APPELLANT, ALEXEY MEDVEDEV, DID NOT APPEAR IN DEPARTMENT 514 DUE TO COURTROOM CONFUSSION. THE COURT ORDES THE SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CONTINUE FROM APR-02-2009 TO APR-14-2009 AT 11:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 514. JUDGE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK; CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 514) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT SHEYNKMAN, VADIM RECOVER FROM APPELLANT MEDVEDEV, ALEXEY $616.31 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $677.31 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

COPY TO THE COURT OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM THE DEFENDANT'S INSURER, BRISTOL WEST INSURANCE GROUP REGARDING PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT AMOUNT TO THE PLAINTIFF AND REQUEST TO PLAINTIFF TO FILE SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT MEDVEDEV, ALEXEY MAILED TO RESPONDENT SHEYNKMAN, VADIM
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF APR-02-2009 - SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL REASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON APR-02-2009 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 514, JUDGE CHAN. (206)
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF DEC-01-2009

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-02-2009 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - PARTIES WOULD NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JPT ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK CLARK BANAYAD, NOT REPORTED (525)

MINUTES FOR APR-14-2009 11:30 AM FOR DEPT 514

TRIAL DE NOVO RE SMALL CLAIMS APPEALS HEARD ON APR-14-2009. THE COURT, HAVING HEARD ORAL EVIDENCE FROM THE PARTIES, THE COURT ENTERS A JUDGMENT. EXHIBITS SUBMITTED ARE RETURN TO RESPECTIVE PARTY. JUDGE BRUCE E. CHAN, CLERK: CARLA CONTRERAS, NOT REPORTED (DEPARTMENT 514)
